summary: Iteration 74 - Funnel Analytics Testing Complete. All 23 backend API tests passed. POST /api/analytics/track works for all 6 funnel events. GET /api/analytics/funnel returns correct unique user counts with drop-off percentages. Deduplication verified - same user_id counted once per event. Existing endpoints (/api/analytics/summary, /api/analytics/events, /api/auth/login, /api/user/trust, /api/invites/me) all working. Frontend tracking code reviewed and properly implemented in all 6 components.

integration_issues.issue: Login button appears stuck in loading state during Playwright automation, but API works correctly via curl. May be a timing/redirect issue.

critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingHint.js: landing_view fires on mount (line 27), start_clicked on button click (line 84) - VERIFIED
DailyBaseSelection.js: base_selected fires on confirm with metadata (line 98) - VERIFIED
DailyOrientationQuestion.js: question_answered fires on answer submit with direction metadata (line 98) - VERIFIED
TrustChangeCard.js: trust_shown fires on data load with score metadata (line 14) - VERIFIED
InlineInviteCard.js: invite_copied fires on copy click with code metadata (line 51) - VERIFIED
track.js: Fire-and-forget POST using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly - VERIFIED
analytics.py: FUNNEL_STEPS array contains all 6 events in correct order - VERIFIED
analytics.py: get_funnel() uses distinct() for deduplication - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: UI tracking code verified via code review, events tracked in DB

verified_features.POST_ANALYTICS_TRACK: PASS - Returns {success: true} and writes to analytics_events collection
verified_features.POST_TRACK_ANONYMOUS: PASS - user_id defaults to 'anonymous' when not provided
verified_features.POST_TRACK_MISSING_EVENT: PASS - Returns {success: false} when event missing
verified_features.FUNNEL_6_STEPS: PASS - landing_view, start_clicked, base_selected, question_answered, trust_shown, invite_copied
verified_features.FUNNEL_PCT_OF_TOP: PASS - Percentage relative to first step
verified_features.FUNNEL_PCT_OF_PREV: PASS - Percentage relative to previous step (null for first)
verified_features.FUNNEL_DAYS_PARAM: PASS - Supports days=1 to days=30, clamped

context_for_next_testing_agent: Funnel analytics fully working. All 6 events tracked: landing_view (OnboardingHint mount), start_clicked (OnboardingHint button), base_selected (DailyBaseSelection confirm), question_answered (DailyOrientationQuestion submit), trust_shown (TrustChangeCard data load), invite_copied (InlineInviteCard copy). GET /api/analytics/funnel returns unique user counts with pct_of_top and pct_of_prev. Events are deduplicated by user_id. The track.js helper is fire-and-forget (no auth needed). Frontend Playwright login has timing issues but all APIs verified working via curl.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real database operations
